entities.name: POVERTY

entities.name: HUNGER

entities.description: Global objectives including ending poverty and hunger by 2030

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of agricultural production needing improvement for economic growth

entities.description: The capacity of agricultural systems to withstand and recover from climate-related shocks

entities.name: AGRIBUSINESS GROWTH
entities.description: The expansion of businesses involved in agricultural production and distribution

entities.name: AGRICULTURE GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in agricultural output and value in developing nations

entities.description: Countries where agricultural growth and data collection methods are critical

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL STATISTICS
entities.description: Data including holding distribution, size, tenure, land use, and means of production

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DATA
entities.description: Information collected regarding agricultural activities and production

entities.name: GEO-STAMPING APPROACH
entities.description: An intervention using RS, GIS, and GPS for crop-area enumeration

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Technology used for scanning the earth via satellite or aircraft to gather data

entities.name: GEOGRAPHIC INFORMATION SYSTEM
entities.description: System for capturing, storing, and analyzing spatial or geographic data

entities.name: GLOBAL POSITIONING SYSTEM
entities.description: Satellite-based navigation system used for precise location mapping

entities.name: CROP-AREA ENUMERATION
entities.description: The process of counting and measuring the area used for crops
